narrative:
Precinct Streetsboro 3-A (precinct in Portage County) has 627 registered voters, with 68.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 13.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.5%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.4 percentage points.
